summary: Testing completed for diary image attachments and on-demand thumbnail generation features. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Diary, Library, and Blog pages all have image upload functionality and use thumbnail URLs for card previews.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/projects/{pid}/diary - creates entry with empty images array
Backend: POST /api/projects/{pid}/diary/{eid}/images - uploads image and returns DiaryImageResponse
Backend: GET /api/files/{path} - serves full image with CORS headers
Backend: GET /api/files/thumb/{path} - generates and serves thumbnail (~300px wide)
Backend: Thumbnail is cached on subsequent requests
Backend: DELETE /api/projects/{pid}/diary/{eid}/images/{iid} - deletes image from disk and DB
Backend: DELETE /api/projects/{pid}/diary/{eid} - cleans up associated images
Backend: GET /api/projects/{pid}/diary - list includes images array for each entry
Backend: GET /api/files/thumb/nonexistent - returns 404
Backend: GET /api/files/nonexistent - returns 404
Frontend: DiaryPage has 'New Entry' button with data-testid='create-diary-entry'
Frontend: DiaryPage create/edit dialog has 'Images' section with 'Add Image' button
Frontend: DiaryPage entry cards use getThumbUrl() for image previews (line 472)
Frontend: DiaryPage view dialog uses getImageUrl() for full images (line 512)
Frontend: DiaryPage lightbox uses getImageUrl() (line 542)
Frontend: LibraryPage entry cards use getThumbUrl() for image previews (line 475)
Frontend: LibraryPage lightbox uses getImageUrl() (line 625)
Frontend: BlogPage has 'New Post' button with 'Add Image' in create dialog
Frontend: BlogPage entry cards use getThumbUrl() for image previews (line 509)
Frontend: BlogPage view dialog uses getImageUrl() for full images (line 557)
critical_code_review_comments: diary.py: Correctly implements image upload with file validation (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WEBP), size limit check, and proper cleanup on entry deletion
health.py: Thumbnail endpoint at /files/thumb/{path} correctly placed BEFORE /files/{path} in route order to avoid shadowing
health.py: Thumbnail generation uses PIL with LANCZOS resampling, 300px width, 75% JPEG quality
health.py: Thumbnails cached in /app/backend/uploads/thumbs/ mirroring original path structure
DiaryPage.jsx: Full rewrite with ImageUploader component, ImageLightbox for full-size viewing
utils.js: getThumbUrl() correctly constructs /api/files/thumb/{path} URLs with token parameter
All three pages (Diary, Library, Blog) correctly use getThumbUrl for card previews and getImageUrl for lightbox/full view
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and Community Garden project
context_for_next_testing_agent: Diary image features fully implemented: POST /api/projects/{pid}/diary/{eid}/images for upload, DELETE for removal. Thumbnail endpoint at GET /api/files/thumb/{path} generates ~300px wide thumbnails on first request and caches them. Frontend uses getThumbUrl() for card previews (small) and getImageUrl() for lightbox/full view. DiaryImageResponse model has id, diary_id, project_id, filename, url, created_at. Thumbnails stored in /app/backend/uploads/thumbs/ directory.
